rag_rules: Place component type assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use visible identifiers and named constants when defining range constraints in AGREE contracts
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax
Component type contracts should relate visible inputs and outputs without referencing implementation-only subcomponents
Use `assume` for preconditions and `guarantee` for postconditions in component type scopes
Define constants and equations with proper AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool)
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` syntax
Equation declarations use `eq name : type = expression;` pattern
Constant declarations use `const name : type = value;` pattern
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
Implementation-level bindings and subcomponent path references
